reason: Promotes a literal 6,000-year-old Earth, human-dinosaur coexistence, and a global flood responsible for all fossil layers.
The Institute for Creation Research uses distorted physical and geological science to validate biblical text over empirical evidence.
Creation Ministries International publishes pseudoscientific articles attacking evolutionary biology, radiometric dating, and astrophysics.
The Discovery Institute leads the 'Wedge Strategy' to rebrand creationism into public schools using pseudoscientific terms like irreducible complexity.
An offshoot media outlet of the Discovery Institute that misrepresents peer-reviewed biology to manufacture false doubt about evolution.
An archive specifically designed to host deceptive biological rebuttals against mainstream science archives like TalkOrigins.
Promotes anti-evolution curricula, literal Genesis accounts, and misleading geology tours claiming the Grand Canyon formed in days.
